// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers services. Services with tags are only registered when matching tags are passed.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="services">The service collection.</param>
        /// <param name="tags">Optional tags to filter which services to register.</param>
        public static global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection services, params global::System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<string> tags)
        {
            if (!tags.Any())
            {
                services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.MemoryCache<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.MemoryCache<>));
                services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.ICache<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.MemoryCache<>));
                services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.Handler<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Handler<>));
                services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.IHandler<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Handler<>));
                services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Handler<global::TestNamespace.Event>, global::TestNamespace.Handler<global::TestNamespace.Event>>();
                services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IHandler<global::TestNamespace.Event>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
                {
                    var s0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.Handler<global::TestNamespace.Event>>();
                    var s1_m0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.ICache<global::TestNamespace.Event>>();
                    var s1 = new global::TestNamespace.CachingDecorator<global::TestNamespace.Event>(s0);
                    s1.Initialize(s1_m0);
                    return s1;
                });
                services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.MemoryCache<global::TestNamespace.Event>, global::TestNamespace.MemoryCache<global::TestNamespace.Event>>();
                services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.ICache<global::TestNamespace.Event>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.MemoryCache<global::TestNamespace.Event>>());
            }

            return services;
        }
    }
}
